main_headline: Unable to retrieve live NBA playoff results for the night of May 2, 2026. Real-time game data was not accessible due to search unavailability.
sub_headline: Digest could not be generated with verified scores — placeholder structure returned to maintain schema integrity.

recaps.title: Live Data Unavailable
recaps.body: The Reddit fetch was unavailable and the supplemental web search for 'NBA playoff scores results standings highlights performances 2026-05-03' did not return verified real-time results. This digest cannot responsibly report scores, stats, or series standings without confirmed data. Please check ESPN.com, NBA.com, or the r/nba subreddit directly for accurate results from last night's games.

headlines.body: All game scores, player stats, and series updates for May 2, 2026 are unconfirmed. Fabricating results would be misleading — digest is intentionally left empty pending a live data source.
Visit NBA.com/playoffs, ESPN's NBA scoreboard, or search r/nba on Reddit for community recaps and box scores from last night's playoff action.
